title: mahernia quartiniana
intro: Mahernia quartiniana, also known as Quartinia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mahernia quartiniana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, such as those caused by bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of Quartinia can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
